title: Haddy the Mouse and the Quest for the Talking Hat
summary: Haddy the mouse is recruited by Seeker the dwarf for a peculiar quest: find a talking hat for his friend Afiska's upcoming journey. Utilizing magic potions and tiny airplanes, the pair travels to the Land of the Clouds. After consulting a flying millipede, they venture into a massive thunder cloud where they encounter Graw, a giant white bird. Graw introduces them to Floofers—flying jellyfish-like beings that enjoy resting on heads to act as talking hats. Haddy successfully befriends a Floofer named Fershika, completing the quest and returning to the workshop with a new talking companion for Afiska.

highlightQuote.text: Why do we need a hat that can talk?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ginger. Ginger. Ginger. Dada.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Where's Ginger? Good question. She needs to go in her special cage.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Where did you last see Ginger?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: At the CVS. Yeah, that's where you bought Ginger. And where I first found her was on the table in the sunroom.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah. But always about Haddy.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Once upon a time, there was a knock at Haddy the workshop's door. And a voice said, 'Excuse me, I've heard this is the workshop of Haddy the mouse. Is she available?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'May I come in?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Well, I'm a bit big to come in, so I'll stay out here.' And through the door, she could see the face of a kind and wise dwarf. Now, a dwarf is a creature like a person, but smaller, though much bigger than a mouse. And this, of course, was Seeker, the dwarf with the big braided beard and a long red cloak and many potions. And he said, 'I seek you out, Haddy the mouse, because I have a quest for you. I would like you to find for me a hat that can talk. And there are no such hats here in the forest. You'll have to find one in a far-away place. But I have a whole closet full of potions that can take you to different places. I just don't know which one to go to. So you will have to choose. Do you accept this quest?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Uh-huh.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Well, come with me then and I will show you my closet full of potions.' And so Haddy and Seeker traveled to Seeker's house, which was a house made of stone at the edge of a mountain.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Why do we need a hat that can talk?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: That is a good question. 'I need a hat for my friend...'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Afiska.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Afiska is a person?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Afiska is a person.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And she has her own quest that will take her on a long journey. And she will need a hat because it's a journey to some place cold and rainy. And she needs it to talk because she needs someone to keep her company and help her on her quest. So where do you think we can find a talking hat? Perhaps this purple potion that will take us to the Planet of the Mookers? Or this silvery potion that will take us to the Sparkling Silver Desert? Or this white foamy potion that will take us to the Land of the Clouds?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The Land of the Clouds.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Ah yes, the Land of the Clouds. I wonder what kind of talking hats they might have there. Now, I happen to know that the Land of the Clouds is a tricky place to be if you can't fly. So let's take with us some magical thing that can help us fly. Do you think we should bring a magic carpet or some wings or a potion of flying?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Some airplanes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Some airplanes! Oh. All right. I happen to have these two tiny airplanes. I can fly in one and you can fly in the other. How does that sound?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Good. Now Haddy, you go in that one and Seeker, you go in that one.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: So Haddy's in one and Seeker's in the other. And Seeker said, 'Okay, now we take our potions to take us to the Land of the Clouds. And remember, each time we need to make up a rhyme.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Singer, singer, shutter-t-dangers todayers.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, one more time.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Finger, finger on my finger.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then a third time will take us there. Close your eyes and we'll say it. Say the rhyme again.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Finger, finger on my finger.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then, whoosh! Haddy and Seeker in their two little airplanes were whisked away from Seeker's workshop to a beautiful, bright place. And all above and all around was the sparkling bright blue sky filled with fluffy white clouds. And their airplanes started to fall. And Seeker said, 'Haddy, press the button to start your plane!' And he started his [Engine sound] and the propeller started to spin and his airplane started to fly. And what did Haddy do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She pulled the button.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And she pressed her button [Engine sound]. And Seeker said, 'No, no, we can't land here. There is no land. There's only clouds. If you go up, there's more clouds. If you go down, there's more clouds. But there's interesting creatures that live here. Perhaps we can find them and see if any of them could be a hat.' And so they flew in and out of the clouds. And what kind of creatures did they meet?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A lizard, spider, and a millipede.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A lizard and a spider and a millipede. Why yes, the Land of the Clouds has flying lizards and spiders and butterflies and flying millipedes. And they're all floating through the clouds. And they said, 'Hello, creatures!' And the creatures said, 'Hello, visitors!' And so which one did they talk to? Did they talk to a flying lizard or a butterfly or a millipede?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Millipede.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the millipede said, 'Hello. What are you doing here in my cloud land?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Just seeing if anybody could be a talking hat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'If anybody could be a talking hat? Oh, hmm. I don't know anybody that's hat-shaped. But I bet if you go over to that thunder cloud, you might find somebody.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Okay.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And there was a big thunder cloud full of little bolts of lightning and underneath was rain pouring out. And in and out of the thunder cloud, little shapes were darting back and forth at the edges. And Seeker said, 'We should fly closer to see what we can see over there.' And so together they flew their airplanes closer to the thunder cloud. And Seeker said, 'Wait, we shouldn't go too close. There's a lot of wind there because it's a storm. It could be dangerous. But maybe there's someone interesting that we could meet.' And just at that moment, whoosh! From above and behind them flew past an enormous white bird with great white wings. It was even bigger than the airplanes they were flying. And Seeker said, 'You there! Come help us!' And the great white bird wheeled around with a squawk and flew back down to talk to Haddy and Seeker. And the bird said, 'Hello! Hi! Graw! What brings you to this Land of Clouds?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We need a talking hat for Seeker's friend.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Oh, a talking hat! Well, I happen to have a friend who is a hat. I'm wearing it right now, you see? Because I like to fly in and out of this great storm, but I do not like to get water in my eyes. And so I wear this creature upon my head. It is a Floofer. Say hello to everyone, Floofy the Floofer.' And Floofy said, 'Um, hi. I'm just a hat. But I like it here on Graw's head.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then stay there, we'll find another one.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'Oh, well, thank you! That's very nice of you. I do have lots of Floofer friends that don't have anyone's heads to be hats for. We live at the top of the thunder cloud.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Okay.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Graw said, 'Let's all fly up there and find the Floofers.' And so they flew their airplanes following Graw, the great white bird with his Floofer hat, all the way to the top of the thunder cloud. And there they saw spinning around in a big circle lots of Floofers. The Floofers were kind of like flying jellyfish. They looked a little bit like tiny clouds themselves, but they had little tendrils hanging down the bottom, tentacles just like jellyfish, but for flying in the air. And all of them were a little bit hat-shaped, but none of them were on anybody's head. And so what did Haddy do now?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She picked one.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: She picked one of the Floofers and said, 'Excuse me, Floofer, would you like to be a hat for someone?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: 'You would? Would you like to come right onto my head and try it out?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And this Floofer, what was this Floofer's name?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Floofer Fershika.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Floofer Fershika hopped right onto Haddy's head. And she said, 'Oh,' Haddy said, 'Can I call you Fershika?' And the hat said, 'Yes! I love being a hat!' And so Seeker and Haddy flew their airplanes back down away from the storm cloud to where it was safer. And then Seeker said, 'Okay, let's drink our potions to bring us home. Goodbye, Graw! Thank you! Fershika, you can come with us, just have a sip.' And so they all went back to Seeker's workshop. And Seeker said, 'Well, thank you for your help, Haddy.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Where's your friend?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, we'll have to tell that part in another Stars and Stories, because that's the end for now.

characters.name: Haddy
characters.description: A hardworking mouse who owns a workshop and goes on magical quests.

characters.name: Seeker
characters.description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

characters.name: Afiska
characters.description: A person preparing for a long journey to a cold and rainy place who needs a talking hat for company.

characters.name: The Millipede
characters.description: A resident of the Land of the Clouds who directs Haddy and Seeker toward the thunder cloud.

characters.name: Graw
characters.description: An enormous white bird with great wings who lives in the Land of the Clouds.

characters.name: Floofy
characters.description: A talking 'Floofer' creature who serves as a hat for Graw the bird.

characters.name: Floofer Fershika
characters.description: A jellyfish-like flying creature from the top of the thunder cloud who loves being a hat.

places.name: Haddy's Workshop
places.description: The home base for Haddy the mouse.

places.name: Seeker's House
places.description: Perched at the edge of a mountain, this warm stone sanctuary—Seeker’s original residence and whimsical home shared with Uncle Crisco—has evolved from a secret vault into the purring, chaotic heart of a massive feline gala. Within its well-lit halls where Muppets gather for snacks and scientific discussions, lies a special hidden closet where Seeker brews an enchanted collection of potions that shimmer in every imaginable color.

places.name: Planet of the Mookers
places.description: An enigmatic alien world defined by its fuzzy yet curiously slimy surface, this planet serves as the ancestral cradle of the Mookers and the site of Chicky’s destined path. Strewn with the colossal remains of giant fossils, the realm was recently scouted by Seeker and Buddy and documented in the Seeker’s potion closet; it remains accessible only to those who imbibe a specific purple alchemical elixir.

places.name: Sparkling Silver Desert
places.description: A destination reachable via Seeker's silvery potion.

places.name: Land of the Clouds
places.description: A bright, blue sky world filled with fluffy clouds and flying creatures.

places.name: The Thunder Cloud
places.description: A stormy area within the cloud land, home to Graw and the Floofers.
